etymology.description: Phonetic Ś§ź (eye and stick representing authority) + Semantic ŚĽĺ (hands representing abundance) -> abundance, eminence
etymology.interpretation: The character combines elements that suggest abundance and authority, reflected by the hands and the symbol of governance, which aligns with the meaning of 'numerous' or 'abundant.'
etymology.simplification: Ś•ā is the simplified form of Ś•ź, retaining the phonetic via reuse of the top component while removing the bottom ŚĽĺ (hands) for stroke reduction.
